items: Collaborated with the client to implement features in both the frontend and backend of an investment platform (SpringBoot, Java & Kotlin, Vue).
Supported the client during the testing phase and resolved bugs during release.
Addressed software vulnerabilities by integrating code quality tools and regularly updating dependencies.
Migrated CI/CD infrastructure and code repository from GitHub and Jenkins to GitLab.

exxeta_2021.position: Full-Stack Developer and Deputy Project Lead
items: Implemented new functionalities based on technical client requirements (Spring Boot, Angular).
Integrated the system with external providers via a secured REST interface.
Provided support and consultation throughout the software development lifecycle up to daily operations in countries across Europe, Asia, and America.
Regularly updated the technology platform used (Spring Boot, Java, Angular, Maven).
Migrated infrastructure to Azure and maintained the running application in a Kubernetes cluster.
Integrated Kafka/Azure Eventhub for asynchronous message transfer between microservices.
Adapted a subsystem to easily swap between different database types (SQL and NoSQL).
Deepened knowledge of applying enterprise software architectures (Domain Driven Design, Hexagonal Architecture).
Supported colleagues in migrating various tools and infrastructure software to Docker.

hstw.school: Hochschule für Technik und Wirtschaft des Saarlandes
hstw.description: Overall grade 2.5. Laid a solid foundation for systematic problem analysis and resolution. Subjects included databases, data analysis, distributed systems, and information retrieval. Example projects:
items: A small client-server appointment calendar program. Responsible for the backend (REST API, database). Written in Java.
A mini search engine capable of returning relevant documents from the New York Times article archive. Using Elasticsearch as a database.
